Est. 1990 Pittsburgh's Korean Kitchen & Sushi Bar

Authentic Korean
food & sushi,
in downtown Pittsburgh.

정성껏

30+ years of slow-simmered stews, charcoal-kissed bulgogi, and hand-cut sashimi at 110 Smithfield — a quiet downtown room where Kim family recipes meet the day's catch.

Authentic Korean Specialties •Premium Sushi & Sashimi •Since 1990 •Downtown Pittsburgh •Korean Soul Food •Authentic Korean Specialties •Premium Sushi & Sashimi •Since 1990 •Downtown Pittsburgh •Korean Soul Food •Authentic Korean Specialties •Premium Sushi & Sashimi •Since 1990 •Downtown Pittsburgh •Korean Soul Food •Authentic Korean Specialties •Premium Sushi & Sashimi •Since 1990 •Downtown Pittsburgh •Korean Soul Food •

Sushi Kim 2 is a family-run Korean restaurant and sushi bar in Downtown Pittsburgh, serving bulgogi, galbi, jjigae, bibimbap, sushi, sashimi, and Korean fried chicken at 110 Smithfield St.

House Specialties

Dishes we've perfected
over 30+ years.

Full Menu →
01

Beef Bulgogi

Thinly sliced beef marinated in a sweet and savory soy-based sauce, grilled to perfection with onions and scallions.

02

Galbi

Tender beef short ribs marinated in a rich Korean BBQ sauce, grilled to a smoky, caramelized finish.

03

Bibimbop

A vibrant Korean rice bowl topped with seasoned vegetables, beef, and a fried egg. Served with house gochujang.

04

Galbi Tang

Beef short rib soup simmered with radish, onions, and glass noodles in a clear, deeply savory broth.

05

Kimchi Jjigae

Aged kimchi stew simmered with pork, tofu, and vegetables — bold, spicy, and deeply flavorful.

06

Sushi Sashimi Platter

Chef's selection of sushi and sashimi, hand-cut daily. Served with wasabi, pickled ginger, and miso soup.

Our Story

A family legacy,
two generations
in Downtown Pittsburgh.

The Kim family opened their first kitchen in 1990, building a reputation for consistency and quality that has spanned over 35 years. Today, Sushi Kim 2 carries that history forward at our Smithfield Street location. The city has changed, but our core recipes remain exactly the same.

Read Our Story →

What Pittsburgh Is Saying

4.8 ★ across 300+ reviews.

★★★★★

"The galbi here is the best I've had outside of Seoul. A downtown Pittsburgh treasure."

— Michelle L. · Google
★★★★★

"30 years strong for a reason. The Kim family cooks with love."

— David R. · Google
★★★★★

"Sashimi is hand-cut and perfect. Banchan is generous and thoughtful."

— Priya S. · Yelp

Visit Us

110 Smithfield St.
Downtown.

A block from Market Square. Lunch service starts at 11:30. Dinner 4:30 to 9. Closed Mondays.
